{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Trader Lar
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Trader Lar]] is a merchant who provides water, fuel, ammo, guns, parts, tools, and cargo.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You missing water, fuel, ammo, or guns?” I recited. “You need new parts, polished tools, or better Subline reception? Spare cargo you need to turn into standards? Trader Lar’s got you covered!”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
